mapping.a_element: 2D critical lattice models (percolation, Ising, self-avoiding walks)
goal of computing exact scaling exponents/dimensions
mapping.b_element: goal of computing exact critical exponents of the steady state

brief_justification: The overlap is only the shared goal of extracting exact critical exponents from a 2D lattice model; the machinery differs decisively. Paper A relies on conformal invariance of the continuum scaling limit and Schramm-Loewner Evolution, whereas Paper B relies on the abelian-group structure of particle-addition operators (equivalence to the Abelian Sandpile model) driving self-organized criticality, so no role-for-role mechanism mapping holds.
